# deck


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Deck

>  Deck ()

*A deck of 52 cards, not including jokers*

When we initially create a deck, all of the cards will be present:

``` python
deck = Deck()
deck
```

    A鈾ｏ笍; 2鈾ｏ笍; 3鈾ｏ笍; 4鈾ｏ笍; 5鈾ｏ笍; 6鈾ｏ笍; 7鈾ｏ笍; 8鈾ｏ笍; 9鈾ｏ笍; 10鈾ｏ笍; J鈾ｏ笍; Q鈾ｏ笍; K鈾ｏ笍; A鈾︼笍; 2鈾︼笍; 3鈾︼笍; 4鈾︼笍; 5鈾︼笍; 6鈾︼笍; 7鈾︼笍; 8鈾︼笍; 9鈾︼笍; 10鈾︼笍; J鈾︼笍; Q鈾︼笍; K鈾︼笍; A鉂わ笍; 2鉂わ笍; 3鉂わ笍; 4鉂わ笍; 5鉂わ笍; 6鉂わ笍; 7鉂わ笍; 8鉂わ笍; 9鉂わ笍; 10鉂わ笍; J鉂わ笍; Q鉂わ笍; K鉂わ笍; A鈾狅笍; 2鈾狅笍; 3鈾狅笍; 4鈾狅笍; 5鈾狅笍; 6鈾狅笍; 7鈾狅笍; 8鈾狅笍; 9鈾狅笍; 10鈾狅笍; J鈾狅笍; Q鈾狅笍; K鈾狅笍

That should be 52 cards.

``` python
test_eq(len(deck), 52)
```

As a reminder, these are the suits we defined for a `Card`:

``` python
suits
```

    ['鈾ｏ笍', '鈾︼笍', '鉂わ笍', '鈾狅笍']

We can check if, say, the Ace of Clubs is in the deck:

``` python
Card(1,1) in deck
```

    True

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Deck.pop

>  Deck.pop (idx:int=-1)

*Remove one card from the deck*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>idx</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>-1</td>
<td>The index of the card to remove, defaulting to the last one</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

``` python
deck = Deck()
test_eq(deck.pop(), Card(3,13))  # K鈾狅笍
```

There are 51 cards left in the deck now.

``` python
test_eq(len(deck), 51)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Deck.remove

>  Deck.remove (card:python_nbdev_starter.card.Card)

*Removes `card` from the deck or raises exception if it is not there*

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>card</td>
<td>Card</td>
<td>Card to remove</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

``` python
card23 = Card(2, 3)
deck.remove(card23)

assert card23 not in deck
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Deck.shuffle

>  Deck.shuffle ()

*Shuffles the cards in this deck*

------------------------------------------------------------------------

### draw_n

>  draw_n (n:int, replace:bool=True)

*Draw `n` cards, with replacement iif `replace`*

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>n</td>
<td>int</td>
<td></td>
<td>number of cards to draw</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>replace</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>whether or not draw with replacement</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

``` python
draw_n(13, replace=False)
```

    [Q鈾狅笍, 8鉂わ笍, 3鈾︼笍, 7鈾ｏ笍, 2鈾ｏ笍, 9鈾︼笍, 9鈾狅笍, 7鈾狅笍, 4鈾狅笍, K鈾ｏ笍, A鈾ｏ笍, 4鈾ｏ笍, 5鈾︼笍]
